title: URAI
summary: Private reflective intelligence for your weeks and seasons.

sections.heading: What it is
sections.body: URAI is a private life intelligence layer that quietly turns your week into a readable map.

sections.heading: How it works
sections.body: Signals become moments, moments become patterns, and patterns become gentle insights you can review and export.

sections.heading: Privacy first
sections.body: Council autonomy is off by default. You choose what is captured, reviewed, exported, or deleted.
